title: Sculk Commander Origin
description: Adds an Origin aligned with the Sculk Horde
body:
This mod allows players to join the [Sculk Horde](https://modrinth.com/mod/sculk-horde) and spread the infestation via an [Origin](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-forge). 

Requires [Apugli](https://modrinth.com/mod/apugli)

# Power List:
**One with the Sculk** - You are a creature of Sculk. You are very vulnerable to certain items, but other Sculk mobs will not attack you.

**Ours to Command** - As a leader of the Horde, you may request reinforcements from the Gravemind periodically using nearby Sculk Summoners.

**Emergency Measures** - You have the ability to return a portion of your body to the Sculk, infesting nearby land and summoning additional creatures.

**Home Field Advantage** - You become healed and satiated when nearby infested blocks.

**Synthetic** - Your body does not function through normal means. You cannot eat or regenerate naturally.

**Infest** - Your attacks have a 10% chance to inflict Burrowed.

**Harbinger** - The Gravemind tracks your movement and may raid points of interest that you visit.

**CONSUME**. - You are prohibited from performing certain inefficient actions, such as breeding animals.

**Unimpeded** - You are immune to the Darkness effect, and Sculk Sensors do not detect you.

**Feared** - Villagers will refuse to interact with you, and Iron Golems attack you.

**Impure Warding** - A complicated system of wards decreases the duration of any applied Purity effect to 30 seconds.
